Asian Hall of Fame inducts Class of 2024, launches $8M campaign. Ceremony on Oct 19 at Biltmore LA, streaming on Roku GAME.
news.summary: A ceremony marking the 20th anniversary kicked off an $8 million capital campaign in Los Angeles on October 16, 2024. The Asian Hall of Fame welcomed the Class of 2024 on October 19 at the Biltmore Los Angeles. The event was live-streamed on Roku GAME, with the Getty Images red carpet commencing at 3:30 p.m. Additionally, the UCLA Air Force ROTC was part of the event.

VP Kamala Harris aims to partner with AI and crypto industries to invest in America's competitiveness and future. Chris Larsen, co-founder of Ripple, gave $1 million worth of XRP tokens to her-friendly super PAC. Expert sees support for emerging technologies as inevitable for future presidencies.
news.summary: Vice President and Democratic presidential candidate Kamala Harris appealed to the crypto and AI industries at a Wall Street fundraiser in late September. She expressed a commitment to partner with these sectors to invest in America's competitiveness and future, encouraging technologies like AI and digital assets while ensuring consumer and investor protection. The approach has garnered support, as Chris Larsen, co-founder of Ripple, donated $1 million worth of XRP tokens to a Harris-friendly super PAC. Charles Dray, CEO of Resonance Security, using AI for securing smart contracts and crypto assets, applauded Harris' stance, noting that governmental support for emerging technologies is inevitable. The focus now lies on how the government will effectively balance supporting technological advancement while curbing malicious uses.

news.headline: World of Hyatt and Peloton partnership offers 100 bonus points to members for each completed workout.
news.summary: Participants in the World of Hyatt and Peloton programs are eligible to receive 100 Bonus Points for each workout completed when they connect their World of Hyatt and Peloton accounts.

news.headline: Victor Capital Partners closes Fund II at $310M in commitments, exceeding targets with strong investor support.
news.summary: A private equity firm, Victor Capital Partners, revealed the completion of its oversubscribed Victor Capital Partners Fund II, L.P. The fund, aimed at branded businesses in specialty consumer, industrial technology, and business services sectors, achieved capital commitments of $310 million. The fundraising for Fund II surpassed expectations, drawing substantial backing from both existing and new investors.

news.headline: Surface Mount Technology (SMT) Equipment Market projected to reach $10.19 billion by 2031, growing at 6.0% CAGR from 2023 ($6.38 billion).
news.summary: The market for Surface Mount Technology (SMT) Equipment is projected to grow significantly, with a forecasted increase from US$6.38 billion in 2023 to US$10.19 billion by 2031, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.0% during this period. The insights were derived from a detailed report by The Insight Partners, released on October 16, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Toll Brothers to launch luxury townhome community, Towns at Plymouth Walk, in Michigan by early 2025. #RealEstate #LuxuryLiving
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Toll Brothers, Inc. unveiled its upcoming project, The Towns at Plymouth Walk, set to be established in Plymouth, Michigan. This development by the renowned luxury home builder will offer high-end townhomes in a prime location close to downtown Plymouth. Sales for these luxury properties are projected to commence in early 2025.

news.headline: Pimco Executive: We expect the fiscal outlook in the UK to be tight, and we continue to like UK government bonds.
Astroport and Orbit Fab team up for lunar exploration; partnership to expedite development of space technologies.
news.summary: Milan, Oct. 16, 2024 - Astroport Space Technologies, a renowned company specializing in cutting-edge space exploration technologies, has joined forces with Orbit Fab, a trailblazer in in-space refueling and resource management. This strategic partnership aims to expedite the progress of their joint projects, leveraging their respective expertise to enhance innovations in the field.

news.headline: Tech Interactive honors Fei Fei Li at 7th Annual Tech for Global Good Celebration on Oct. 19, 2024 in San Jose, California.
news.summary: SAN JOSE, California - The Tech Interactive is excited to present the 2024 Tech for Global Good Celebration on October 19, 2024. The event aims to promote STEAM education and honor a new group of laureates leveraging artificial intelligence to create positive global impact. This initiative highlights the importance of innovation and education in driving societal change.

news.headline: 7AI appoints Nathan Burke as CMO and Allen to leadership team, enhancing expertise in cybersecurity and AI fields.
news.summary: A team of security and AI experts at 7AI, the agentic security company based in Boston, has welcomed Nathan Burke as their new Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) along with Allen, bringing their combined expertise to bolster the company's efforts in cybersecurity. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, marking a significant development in the company's leadership.

news.headline: Kiavi completes $400M securitization of residential transition loans, its 20th transaction in 5 years, showing growth.
news.summary: A leading tech-enabled lender specializing in residential real estate investments, Kiavi, unveiled its second rated securitization deal on October 16, 2024. This milestone transaction was oversubscribed and upsized, showcasing the immense investor demand. Kiavi's successful securitization attracted significant interest from investors, underscoring confidence in the company. This achievement demonstrates Kiavi's position as a prominent player in the market.

news.headline: A2P and P2A messaging market to exceed $85 billion by 2031, fueled by mobile adoption and customer engagement.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Lewes, Delaware, the A2P and P2A messaging market is experiencing growth due to the widespread use of mobile devices and the growing need for efficient communication between businesses and consumers. Companies are aiming to improve customer engagement and operational efficiency. This market is witnessing significant expansion, with a projected increase in adoption rate of mobile devices and a rising demand for seamless communication between businesses and consumers.

news.headline: Global digital dentures market to reach USD 2.16 billion by 2029, with a 8.7% CAGR. driven by tech advancements.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of October 16, 2024, the worldwide market for digital dentures is anticipated to increase from USD 1.42 billion in 2024 to USD 2.16 billion by 2029, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.7% over this timeframe. The surge in market value is largely attributed to progressions in digital technologies...

news.headline: Amorphous and Nanocrystalline Core Market to Reach USD 804.9 million by 2030 with a CAGR of 19.1%.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of October 16, 2024, the market for amorphous and nanocrystalline cores is experiencing significant segmentation based on type, including Fe based, Iron Nickel based, Cobalt based, among others. The applications of these cores span across various sectors such as automobile, photovoltaic wind power, home appliances, computers, office equipment, and communications. This market trend indicates a growing diversity in core types and applications, reflecting the demand within industries for specialized solutions.

news.headline: SPX FLOW partners with HÆRFEST Coffee Roasting Co., offering mission-driven coffee in company marketplace and catered events. Founded by Toby Foreman in NC.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina, SPX FLOW revealed its collaboration with HÆRFEST Coffee Roasting Co. to provide its company marketplace and catered events with ethically sourced coffee. HÆRFEST, established by Toby Foreman in Davidson, NC, will be supplying its mission-driven coffee for this partnership.

news.headline: Krispy Krunchy Chicken® wows at 2024 NACS Show with 3,000 locations; serves 10,000 pounds at event.
news.summary: At the recent National Association of Convenience Stores (NACS) Show in Las Vegas, Krispy Krunchy Chicken® shined with over 3,000 locations, solidifying its position as a rapidly growing player in the convenience store food business. The event, which took place from October 8-10 at the Las Vegas Convention Center, saw the participation of key industry figures. Krispy Krunchy® stole the show by serving almost 10,000 pounds of its popular menu items.

news.headline: Italy may increase Bitcoin capital gains tax to 42% from 26% and eliminate 750 million euro revenue threshold for Digital Services Tax.
news.summary: The Italian government is looking to increase the tax on Bitcoin capital gains to 42% and eliminate the previous requirement of having a minimum revenue of 750 million euros for the Digital Services Tax.

news.headline: Elon Musk has influenced markets 6 times with his comments on Dogecoin.
Bitcoin surges to highest level in 2.5 months as Trump's lead grows, showing a correlation, industry experts note.
news.summary: Observers in the financial sector have noted a growing alignment between Bitcoin and the likelihood of former President Donald Trump winning.

news.headline: EigenLayer operators compete for restakers as P2P emphasizes revenue share to maintain top spot among validators.
news.summary: The P2P network is focused on maintaining its position as a top EigenLayer validator, prior to an upcoming increase in restaking rewards within the protocol.

news.headline: TON collaborates with Axelar to connect 68 blockchains in Web3 system. Axelar’s technology will enhance TON’s ecosystem.
news.summary: Axelar's technology, including the Interchain Amplifier and Mobius Development Stack, has the potential to introduce blockchain interoperability to TON's ecosystem. This advancement could significantly impact the integration and communication between different blockchains within TON, offering a more interconnected and seamless experience for users.

news.headline: DOGE sees 10% surge in price, fueling speculation of a "god candle" as memecoin traders flock to invest.
news.summary: In the last seven days, the price of DOGE experienced a significant increase, with a double-digit rally, as traders in the memecoin market opened new positions hoping for further growth.

news.headline: ESMA calls for changes to MiCA crypto rules after EC raised legal concerns, stressing key objectives. #EU #cryptocurrency.
news.summary: The European Securities and Markets Authority recognized the legal constraints highlighted by the European Commission, while underscoring the significance of the framework's original goals.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index 73/100 = Greed
Fear and Greed Index 68/100 = Greed
Ozarks Healthcare partners with Avo to integrate AI decision support into EHR, enhancing patient care.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in West Plains, Missouri, Ozarks Healthcare revealed a new collaboration with Avo, previously AvoMD, to incorporate Avo's cutting-edge AI clinical decision support platform into its MEDITECH Electronic Health Record (EHR) system. This partnership aims to enhance medical decision-making at Ozarks Healthcare, a prominent healthcare facility in the region.

news.headline: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.09 quarterly cash dividend, $0.36 annual rate, same as previous quarter.
news.summary: Today, in Catskill, NY, Greene County Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ-GCBC) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.09 per share on its common stock. This equates to an annual cash dividend rate of $0.36 per share, consistent with the previous quarter. The Board of Directors approved this dividend announcement.

news.headline: Global Industrial Valve market to reach $121.67 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 4.9% from $95.58 billion in 2024.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects that the global Industrial Valve market is anticipated to reach USD 121.67 billion by 2029, showing growth from USD 95.58 billion in 2024. This indicates a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.9% during the forecast period. The industrial valve market is experiencing significant advancements and expansion.

news.headline: Spiders can be deadly - Pet experts warn Halloween bites can be fatal. Difficult to diagnose.
news.summary: Pet poison experts have issued a warning, stating that bites from common Halloween creatures like spiders can be fatal and hard to identify. The review of case data conducted by the experts at Pet Poison Helpline revealed the severity of the issue. The findings indicate that a significant number of cases involve bites that are difficult to diagnose, posing a serious threat to pets. The warning comes ahead of the Halloween season, reminding pet owners to be vigilant and take necessary precautions to protect their pets from potentially deadly bites.

news.headline: Global Combat Management System market expected to reach USD 29 billion by 2030 with an 11% CAGR. Rising defense budgets driving growth.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Lewes, Delaware, it was reported that the Combat Management System (CMS) market is experiencing significant growth. This growth is attributed to the rise in defense budgets worldwide, with a focus on countries looking to enhance their military technology. The increasing geopolitical tensions further contribute to the demand for advanced CMS. The market's expansion is notable, with numbers pointing towards a substantial increase in investments and procurement related to CMS technologies.

news.headline: myCIO Wealth Partners ranks 11th in America and 1st in Pennsylvania on Forbes Top RIA Firms List 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on Oct. 16, 2024, myCIO Wealth Partners shared their achievement of being ranked 11th nationally and securing the top position in Pennsylvania. This recognition comes from the Forbes/SHOOK Research list, where they stood out among 46,212 nominations for America's Top Registered Investment Advisory (RIA) Firms. This ranking underscores their commitment to excellence and client service in the financial industry.

news.headline: Huggies® is giving away baby bodysuits to promote safe sleep practices during Safe Sleep Awareness Month in October 2024.
news.summary: In an effort to promote safe sleep practices recommended by experts, a brand based in Chicago is distributing free baby bodysuits during October 2024, which is Safe Sleep and Sudden Infant Death Syndrome (SIDS) awareness month. The initiative by Kimberly-Clark U.S. aims to educate caregivers and raise awareness about safe sleep practices for infants.

news.headline: Feedonomics partners with YouTube for Shopping affiliate program, offering product listing and data optimization. Woodland Hills, Calif., Oct 16, 2024. (Source: PRNewswire)
news.summary: Feedonomics, based in Woodland Hills, California, revealed on October 16, 2024, their collaboration with YouTube Shopping affiliate merchants. The company, known for its expertise in product feed management for online retailers, will offer scalable solutions for optimizing product listings and data. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the performance of merchants on YouTube Shopping platform.

news.headline: Phoenix Tower Intl certified as Great Place To Work® in 10 markets. Global leader in wireless infrastructure. Oct 16, 2024.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on October 16, 2024, Phoenix Tower International (PTI), a prominent player in wireless communications infrastructure worldwide, has proudly disclosed its accreditation as a Great Place To Work® in 10 different markets. This prestigious acknowledgment is solely grounded on employee feedback and satisfaction.

news.headline: MyDirectives and National POLST Collaborative join to improve quality and accessibility of medical orders in US, aiming to help healthcare professionals create high-quality orders.
news.summary: A strategic agreement has been announced between MyDirectives, a prominent provider of digital advance care planning tools, and the National POLST Collaborative, a leading advocate for patient-centered portable medical orders. This collaboration aims to enhance the quality and accessibility of portable medical orders throughout the United States. By combining the capabilities of both entities, healthcare professionals will be empowered to develop and oversee top-notch, state-of-the-art solutions. This partnership is set to revolutionize the landscape of portable medical orders across the nation.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs honors Abhinav Shashank, CEO of Innovaccer, as a top entrepreneur at its summit. Exceptional leader in healthcare AI.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) has acknowledged Abhinav Shashank, the cofounder and CEO of Innovaccer, as one of the most exceptional entrepreneurs of 2024. This recognition took place at the Builders and Innovators Summit in Healdsburg, California. Abhinav was chosen by Goldman Sachs as a standout leader from various industries for recognition at the two-day event. He is credited as the driving force behind Innovaccer, a prominent healthcare AI company based in San Francisco. Abhinav's dedication is centered on utilizing technology to innovate and improve healthcare services.

news.headline: Anthony Scaramucci criticizes Donald Trump's World Liberty Financial DeFi project as a "money scam" that investors should avoid at all costs. Scaramucci questions Trump's motives and warns of potential misuse of funds.
news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci criticized former President Donald Trump for involving himself in what he referred to as "nonsense" by launching the former president’s World Liberty Financial (WLFI) DeFi project. Speaking at the Stellar Meridian conference in London, Scaramucci warned that Trump is essentially using WLFI and his Truth Social platform as a means of generating revenue, describing it as a "money scam." He emphasized that Trump could potentially redirect funds for other purposes through this "transparent scam," advising investors to steer clear of it entirely. Scaramucci also questioned whether WLFI would resonate with crypto-oriented voters, expressing doubts about its appeal. It is suggested to refer to Benzinga.com for the complete story.

news.headline: Southern California sees growth in new space hub, with significant economic impact and job creation.
New Dräger OXY SR Cap III provides rapid oxygen delivery for underground workers, NIOSH-certified for mining, lasts up to 10 years.
news.summary: A new rapid oxygen delivery system has been developed to aid workers in underground and confined spaces to escape hazardous conditions securely. The self-rescue device activates quickly to ensure immediate safety and is designed to endure harsh environments. It is certified by NIOSH for use in mining and industrial settings. The device can provide up to 10 years of reliable service.
